records.m_Talk_ENG: Prepare the feast. A new dawn is coming.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Prepare the feast. A new dawn is coming.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Prepare the feast. A new dawn is coming.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The feast will complete the imperfect knowledge and perfect the imperfect beings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The feast will complete the imperfect knowledge and perfect the imperfect beings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The feast will complete the imperfect knowledge and perfect the imperfect beings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When shall the banquet begin?
records.m_Talk_DEU: When shall the banquet begin?
records.m_Talk_FRA: When shall the banquet begin?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The long thirst and hunger are finally coming to an end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The long thirst and hunger are finally coming to an end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The long thirst and hunger are finally coming to an end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The host of the feast has arrived. Mother has arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The host of the feast has arrived. Mother has arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The host of the feast has arrived. Mother has arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Eve!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Eve!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Eve!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, are you okay? Why are you sweating so much?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, are you okay? Why are you sweating so much?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, are you okay? Why are you sweating so much?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Ann?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Ann?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Ann?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you have that weird dream again?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you have that weird dream again?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you have that weird dream again?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Telepathy</color>, was it? Seems like a real hassle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Telepathy</color>, was it? Seems like a real hassle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Telepathy</color>, was it? Seems like a real hassle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How can you sleep when you have dreams like that every day?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How can you sleep when you have dreams like that every day?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How can you sleep when you have dreams like that every day?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. Even Sister Theodora said that it was going to be all right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. Even Sister Theodora said that it was going to be all right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. Even Sister Theodora said that it was going to be all right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. Thanks, Ann.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. Thanks, Ann.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. Thanks, Ann.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's hurry. If we miss another test, we'll have to clean out the chicken pen!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's hurry. If we miss another test, we'll have to clean out the chicken pen!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's hurry. If we miss another test, we'll have to clean out the chicken pen!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm so sick of chicken poop! But I still do like chicken stew.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm so sick of chicken poop! But I still do like chicken stew.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm so sick of chicken poop! But I still do like chicken stew.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He! He! He! He! We finally met! Masked Counter! I am Monster No. 999, Tickle-tickle!
records.m_Talk_DEU: He! He! He! He! We finally met! Masked Counter! I am Monster No. 999, Tickle-tickle!
records.m_Talk_FRA: He! He! He! He! We finally met! Masked Counter! I am Monster No. 999, Tickle-tickle!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tickle-tickle? There's no monster named that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tickle-tickle? There's no monster named that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tickle-tickle? There's no monster named that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: C'mon! Just roll with it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C'mon! Just roll with it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C'mon! Just roll with it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway! I am the monster of justice who comes to punish naughty children who don't laugh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway! I am the monster of justice who comes to punish naughty children who don't laugh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway! I am the monster of justice who comes to punish naughty children who don't laugh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will you be able to withstand my attack?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will you be able to withstand my attack?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will you be able to withstand my attack?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tickle, tickle!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tickle, tickle!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tickle, tickle!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah hah! Okay, Ann! I'll laugh! I promise!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah hah! Okay, Ann! I'll laugh! I promise!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah hah! Okay, Ann! I'll laugh! I promise!

records.m_Talk_ENG: He! He! He! He! That laugh won't cut it! Masked Counter!
records.m_Talk_DEU: He! He! He! He! That laugh won't cut it! Masked Counter!
records.m_Talk_FRA: He! He! He! He! That laugh won't cut it! Masked Counter!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tickle, tickle!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tickle, tickle!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tickle, tickle!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah! Ah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah! I-it tickles, Ann!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah! Ah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah! I-it tickles, Ann!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah! Ah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah! I-it tickles, Ann!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Stop...! I said, sto
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Stop...! I said, sto
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Stop...! I said, sto
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Eve! Ann! Why are you still here when the test has already begun
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Eve! Ann! Why are you still here when the test has already begun
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Eve! Ann! Why are you still here when the test has already begun
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: You two! Causing trouble again?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You two! Causing trouble again?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You two! Causing trouble again?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to tell on Sister Theodora!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to tell on Sister Theodora!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to tell on Sister Theodora!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Agh! It's the eyeglasses monster! Run, Eve!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Agh! It's the eyeglasses monster! Run, Eve!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Agh! It's the eyeglasses monster! Run, Eve!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You two stop right there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You two stop right there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You two stop right there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You brats...! There will be no meals for the entire day when I catch you!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You brats...! There will be no meals for the entire day when I catch you!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You brats...! There will be no meals for the entire day when I catch you!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although she says that, Benjamin always gave us something to eat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although she says that, Benjamin always gave us something to eat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although she says that, Benjamin always gave us something to eat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her nagging might be a lot, but I think it's because she cares about us like a real family.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her nagging might be a lot, but I think it's because she cares about us like a real family.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her nagging might be a lot, but I think it's because she cares about us like a real family.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Rosenthal Orphanage</color>'s daily routines start at 7 in the morning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Rosenthal Orphanage</color>'s daily routines start at 7 in the morning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Rosenthal Orphanage</color>'s daily routines start at 7 in the morning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After some breakfast, we get something called an aptitude education.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After some breakfast, we get something called an aptitude education.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After some breakfast, we get something called an aptitude education.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And today's the day of the aptitude test.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And today's the day of the aptitude test.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And today's the day of the aptitude test.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The test will start now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The test will start now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The test will start now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those ready to take to the test, please step up one at a time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those ready to take to the test, please step up one at a time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those ready to take to the test, please step up one at a time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is said that Dean Theodora operates this place with the support of the Holy Curia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is said that Dean Theodora operates this place with the support of the Holy Curia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is said that Dean Theodora operates this place with the support of the Holy Curia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why Rosenthal only accepts orphans who are Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why Rosenthal only accepts orphans who are Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why Rosenthal only accepts orphans who are Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rosenthal's goal is to train young Counters and return them to society.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rosenthal's goal is to train young Counters and return them to society.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rosenthal's goal is to train young Counters and return them to society.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In fact, there are children who were directly scouted by the Holy Curia too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In fact, there are children who were directly scouted by the Holy Curia too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In fact, there are children who were directly scouted by the Holy Curia too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, now, everyone. Stop chitchatting and please keep moving.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, now, everyone. Stop chitchatting and please keep moving.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, now, everyone. Stop chitchatting and please keep moving.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Submit your physical examination report here, and your test sheet here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Submit your physical examination report here, and your test sheet here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Submit your physical examination report here, and your test sheet here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I heard the test was conducted by a trustworthy external research institute.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard the test was conducted by a trustworthy external research institute.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard the test was conducted by a trustworthy external research institute.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The physical examination includes drawing blood, and the test checks for CRF usage and focus.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The physical examination includes drawing blood, and the test checks for CRF usage and focus.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The physical examination includes drawing blood, and the test checks for CRF usage and focus.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The children here do their best on the test so that they can go to a good place after leaving the orphanage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The children here do their best on the test so that they can go to a good place after leaving the orphanage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The children here do their best on the test so that they can go to a good place after leaving the orphanage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, there are some children, like us, who don't.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, there are some children, like us, who don't.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, there are some children, like us, who don't.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eve? So how many did you stack this time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eve? So how many did you stack this time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eve? So how many did you stack this time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fifteen...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fifteen...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fifteen...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, same here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, same here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, same here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh! What does stacking blocks have to do with Counter abilities, anyway?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh! What does stacking blocks have to do with Counter abilities, anyway?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh! What does stacking blocks have to do with Counter abilities, anyway?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course it matters... They said they were also evaluating our concentration and dexterity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course it matters... They said they were also evaluating our concentration and dexterity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course it matters... They said they were also evaluating our concentration and dexterity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Are you stupid? You really believe that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Are you stupid? You really believe that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Are you stupid? You really believe that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those adults just like to rank things. This is just an evaluation for the purpose of evaluating.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those adults just like to rank things. This is just an evaluation for the purpose of evaluating.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those adults just like to rank things. This is just an evaluation for the purpose of evaluating.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All that Counters need to be is cool and super strong! Like the Masked Counter!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All that Counters need to be is cool and super strong! Like the Masked Counter!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All that Counters need to be is cool and super strong! Like the Masked Counter!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like this...! Haah! Hya!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like this...! Haah! Hya!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like this...! Haah! Hya!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Kyaaa!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kyaaa!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kyaaa!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oops! I'm sorry! Are you okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oops! I'm sorry! Are you okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oops! I'm sorry! Are you okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Filthy child! Don't touch me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Filthy child! Don't touch me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Filthy child! Don't touch me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're nothing but monsters abandoned by your parents...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're nothing but monsters abandoned by your parents...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're nothing but monsters abandoned by your parents...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeesh... She didn't have to be that rude...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeesh... She didn't have to be that rude...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeesh... She didn't have to be that rude...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ann...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ann...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ann...

records.m_Talk_ENG: K-kwaaar?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: K-kwaaar?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: K-kwaaar?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eve?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eve?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eve?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm the Tickle-tickle monster! I-I'm here to punish children who don't laugh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm the Tickle-tickle monster! I-I'm here to punish children who don't laugh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm the Tickle-tickle monster! I-I'm here to punish children who don't laugh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kwarrr!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kwarrr!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kwarrr!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Pfft!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Pfft!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Pfft!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahahahaha! What was that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahahahaha! What was that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahahahaha! What was that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! You've finally shown your face! Tickle-tickle monster!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! You've finally shown your face! Tickle-tickle monster!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! You've finally shown your face! Tickle-tickle monster!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, the Masked Counter will take you on!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, the Masked Counter will take you on!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, the Masked Counter will take you on!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never thought about what would happen after I left Rosenthal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never thought about what would happen after I left Rosenthal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never thought about what would happen after I left Rosenthal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike the other children, I never wanted to go somewhere else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike the other children, I never wanted to go somewhere else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike the other children, I never wanted to go somewhere else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I was happy just being here with the friends I've made.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I was happy just being here with the friends I've made.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I was happy just being here with the friends I've made.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just being able to be together and laugh was all that I wanted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just being able to be together and laugh was all that I wanted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just being able to be together and laugh was all that I wanted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, everyone. Today, I have an exciting announcement.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, everyone. Today, I have an exciting announcement.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, everyone. Today, I have an exciting announcement.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Benjamin was recognized for her aptitude evaluation and was offered a job at a pharmaceutical company.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Benjamin was recognized for her aptitude evaluation and was offered a job at a pharmaceutical company.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Benjamin was recognized for her aptitude evaluation and was offered a job at a pharmaceutical company.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's sad to see her go, but today will be Benjamin's last day at the orphanage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's sad to see her go, but today will be Benjamin's last day at the orphanage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's sad to see her go, but today will be Benjamin's last day at the orphanage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, give Benjamin a big round of applause!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, give Benjamin a big round of applause!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, give Benjamin a big round of applause!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Congrats, Benjamin!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Congrats, Benjamin!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Congrats, Benjamin!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're not going to forget about us just because you got a cushy job now, are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're not going to forget about us just because you got a cushy job now, are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're not going to forget about us just because you got a cushy job now, are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, everyone. I'll send you some gifts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, everyone. I'll send you some gifts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, everyone. I'll send you some gifts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now then, let's eat before all the food gets cold!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now then, let's eat before all the food gets cold!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now then, let's eat before all the food gets cold!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guys, wait! Before we eat, Eve has something to say to Benjamin!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guys, wait! Before we eat, Eve has something to say to Benjamin!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guys, wait! Before we eat, Eve has something to say to Benjamin!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-when did I say that...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-when did I say that...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-when did I say that...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: C'mon, you idiot! Then are you really just going to stand there and not say goodbye to her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: C'mon, you idiot! Then are you really just going to stand there and not say goodbye to her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: C'mon, you idiot! Then are you really just going to stand there and not say goodbye to her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, Eve? So what did you want to tell me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, Eve? So what did you want to tell me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, Eve? So what did you want to tell me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sniffle...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sniffle...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sniffle...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hngh... Do you really have to go?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hngh... Do you really have to go?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hngh... Do you really have to go?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can't we just live here like we always have? Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can't we just live here like we always have? Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can't we just live here like we always have? Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think I'm going to be sad without you here. So... *Sniffle.*
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think I'm going to be sad without you here. So... *Sniffle.*
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think I'm going to be sad without you here. So... *Sniffle.*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. It's not like we're never going to see each other again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. It's not like we're never going to see each other again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. It's not like we're never going to see each other again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you'll be all right without me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you'll be all right without me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you'll be all right without me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And Eve, you should also develop your aptitude to get a better job than me, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And Eve, you should also develop your aptitude to get a better job than me, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And Eve, you should also develop your aptitude to get a better job than me, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, but still...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, but still...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, but still...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, well. Although I'm not supposed to give crying children presents...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, well. Although I'm not supposed to give crying children presents...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, well. Although I'm not supposed to give crying children presents...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make an exception and give you something special! This is my stuffed animal that I sleep with.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll make an exception and give you something special! This is my stuffed animal that I sleep with.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll make an exception and give you something special! This is my stuffed animal that I sleep with.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A rabbit doll...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A rabbit doll...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A rabbit doll...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, yup. It's a little tattered, but I'll give it to you, Eve. Instead, you have to take good care of it, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, yup. It's a little tattered, but I'll give it to you, Eve. Instead, you have to take good care of it, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, yup. It's a little tattered, but I'll give it to you, Eve. Instead, you have to take good care of it, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Now no more crying!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Now no more crying!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Now no more crying!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...No more crying!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...No more crying!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...No more crying!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, Benjamin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, Benjamin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, Benjamin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll... take real good care of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll... take real good care of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll... take real good care of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, everyone! Before we start the feast, let's say a prayer to thank Mother for Benjamin!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, everyone! Before we start the feast, let's say a prayer to thank Mother for Benjamin!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, everyone! Before we start the feast, let's say a prayer to thank Mother for Benjamin!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All this food is communion made from our Mother's flesh and blood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All this food is communion made from our Mother's flesh and blood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All this food is communion made from our Mother's flesh and blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So everyone should all eat while praying for Benjamin's bright future ahead of her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So everyone should all eat while praying for Benjamin's bright future ahead of her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So everyone should all eat while praying for Benjamin's bright future ahead of her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we didn't know back then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we didn't know back then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we didn't know back then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: About what will happen to us, or the orphanage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: About what will happen to us, or the orphanage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: About what will happen to us, or the orphanage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Prepare the feast. A new dawn is coming.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Prepare the feast. A new dawn is coming.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Prepare the feast. A new dawn is coming.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The feast will complete the imperfect knowledge and perfect the imperfect beings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The feast will complete the imperfect knowledge and perfect the imperfect beings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The feast will complete the imperfect knowledge and perfect the imperfect beings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When shall the banquet begin?
records.m_Talk_DEU: When shall the banquet begin?
records.m_Talk_FRA: When shall the banquet begin?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The long thirst and hunger are finally coming to an end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The long thirst and hunger are finally coming to an end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The long thirst and hunger are finally coming to an end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The host of the feast has arrived. Mother has arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The host of the feast has arrived. Mother has arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The host of the feast has arrived. Mother has arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Eve!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Eve!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Eve!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Ann?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Ann?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Ann?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wake up, sleepyhead! How much longer are you gonna stay in bed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wake up, sleepyhead! How much longer are you gonna stay in bed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wake up, sleepyhead! How much longer are you gonna stay in bed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... huh? What's that rag doll you got there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... huh? What's that rag doll you got there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... huh? What's that rag doll you got there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Rag?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Rag?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Rag?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't call it that...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't call it that...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't call it that...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How can you say something so mean?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How can you say something so mean?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How can you say something so mean?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you getting angry at me for?! I'm just saying what was on my mind...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you getting angry at me for?! I'm just saying what was on my mind...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you getting angry at me for?! I'm just saying what was on my mind...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You saw it with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You saw it with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You saw it with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This doll... This doll was! At yesterday's feast...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This doll... This doll was! At yesterday's feast...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This doll... This doll was! At yesterday's feast...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: At the feast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At the feast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At the feast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who gave me... this doll?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who gave me... this doll?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who gave me... this doll?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Prepare the feast. A new dawn is coming.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When shall the banquet begin?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The long thirst and hunger are finally coming to an end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The long thirst and hunger are finally coming to an end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The long thirst and hunger are finally coming to an end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The host of the feast has arrived. Mother has arrived.

root.m_Talk_FRA: The host of the feast has arrived. Mother has arrived.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Eve!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Eve!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Eve!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, are you okay? Why are you sweating so much?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, are you okay? Why are you sweating so much?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, are you okay? Why are you sweating so much?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Ann?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Ann?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Ann?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you have that weird dream again?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you have that weird dream again?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you have that weird dream again?

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Telepathy</color>, was it? Seems like a real hassle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Telepathy</color>, was it? Seems like a real hassle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Telepathy</color>, was it? Seems like a real hassle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How can you sleep when you have dreams like that every day?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How can you sleep when you have dreams like that every day?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How can you sleep when you have dreams like that every day?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. Even Sister Theodora said that it was going to be all right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. Even Sister Theodora said that it was going to be all right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. Even Sister Theodora said that it was going to be all right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. Thanks, Ann.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. Thanks, Ann.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. Thanks, Ann.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's hurry. If we miss another test, we'll have to clean out the chicken pen!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's hurry. If we miss another test, we'll have to clean out the chicken pen!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's hurry. If we miss another test, we'll have to clean out the chicken pen!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm so sick of chicken poop! But I still do like chicken stew.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm so sick of chicken poop! But I still do like chicken stew.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm so sick of chicken poop! But I still do like chicken stew.

root.m_Talk_ENG: He! He! He! He! We finally met! Masked Counter! I am Monster No. 999, Tickle-tickle!
root.m_Talk_DEU: He! He! He! He! We finally met! Masked Counter! I am Monster No. 999, Tickle-tickle!
root.m_Talk_FRA: He! He! He! He! We finally met! Masked Counter! I am Monster No. 999, Tickle-tickle!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tickle-tickle? There's no monster named that!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tickle-tickle? There's no monster named that!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tickle-tickle? There's no monster named that!

root.m_Talk_ENG: C'mon! Just roll with it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: C'mon! Just roll with it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: C'mon! Just roll with it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway! I am the monster of justice who comes to punish naughty children who don't laugh!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway! I am the monster of justice who comes to punish naughty children who don't laugh!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway! I am the monster of justice who comes to punish naughty children who don't laugh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Will you be able to withstand my attack?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Will you be able to withstand my attack?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Will you be able to withstand my attack?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tickle, tickle!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tickle, tickle!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tickle, tickle!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah hah! Okay, Ann! I'll laugh! I promise!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah hah! Okay, Ann! I'll laugh! I promise!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah hah! Okay, Ann! I'll laugh! I promise!

root.m_Talk_ENG: He! He! He! He! That laugh won't cut it! Masked Counter!
root.m_Talk_DEU: He! He! He! He! That laugh won't cut it! Masked Counter!
root.m_Talk_FRA: He! He! He! He! That laugh won't cut it! Masked Counter!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tickle, tickle!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tickle, tickle!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tickle, tickle!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah! Ah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah! I-it tickles, Ann!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah! Ah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah! I-it tickles, Ann!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah! Ah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah! I-it tickles, Ann!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Stop...! I said, sto
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Stop...! I said, sto
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Stop...! I said, sto
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Eve! Ann! Why are you still here when the test has already begun
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Eve! Ann! Why are you still here when the test has already begun
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Eve! Ann! Why are you still here when the test has already begun
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: You two! Causing trouble again?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You two! Causing trouble again?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You two! Causing trouble again?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm going to tell on Sister Theodora!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm going to tell on Sister Theodora!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm going to tell on Sister Theodora!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Agh! It's the eyeglasses monster! Run, Eve!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Agh! It's the eyeglasses monster! Run, Eve!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Agh! It's the eyeglasses monster! Run, Eve!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You two stop right there!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You two stop right there!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You two stop right there!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You brats...! There will be no meals for the entire day when I catch you!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You brats...! There will be no meals for the entire day when I catch you!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You brats...! There will be no meals for the entire day when I catch you!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Although she says that, Benjamin always gave us something to eat.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Although she says that, Benjamin always gave us something to eat.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Although she says that, Benjamin always gave us something to eat.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Her nagging might be a lot, but I think it's because she cares about us like a real family.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Her nagging might be a lot, but I think it's because she cares about us like a real family.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Her nagging might be a lot, but I think it's because she cares about us like a real family.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Rosenthal Orphanage</color>'s daily routines start at 7 in the morning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Rosenthal Orphanage</color>'s daily routines start at 7 in the morning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Rosenthal Orphanage</color>'s daily routines start at 7 in the morning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After some breakfast, we get something called an aptitude education.
root.m_Talk_DEU: After some breakfast, we get something called an aptitude education.
root.m_Talk_FRA: After some breakfast, we get something called an aptitude education.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And today's the day of the aptitude test.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And today's the day of the aptitude test.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And today's the day of the aptitude test.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The test will start now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The test will start now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The test will start now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those ready to take to the test, please step up one at a time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those ready to take to the test, please step up one at a time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those ready to take to the test, please step up one at a time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is said that Dean Theodora operates this place with the support of the Holy Curia.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is said that Dean Theodora operates this place with the support of the Holy Curia.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is said that Dean Theodora operates this place with the support of the Holy Curia.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why Rosenthal only accepts orphans who are Counters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why Rosenthal only accepts orphans who are Counters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why Rosenthal only accepts orphans who are Counters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rosenthal's goal is to train young Counters and return them to society.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rosenthal's goal is to train young Counters and return them to society.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rosenthal's goal is to train young Counters and return them to society.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In fact, there are children who were directly scouted by the Holy Curia too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In fact, there are children who were directly scouted by the Holy Curia too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In fact, there are children who were directly scouted by the Holy Curia too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, now, everyone. Stop chitchatting and please keep moving.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, now, everyone. Stop chitchatting and please keep moving.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, now, everyone. Stop chitchatting and please keep moving.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Submit your physical examination report here, and your test sheet here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Submit your physical examination report here, and your test sheet here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Submit your physical examination report here, and your test sheet here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I heard the test was conducted by a trustworthy external research institute.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I heard the test was conducted by a trustworthy external research institute.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I heard the test was conducted by a trustworthy external research institute.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The physical examination includes drawing blood, and the test checks for CRF usage and focus.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The physical examination includes drawing blood, and the test checks for CRF usage and focus.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The physical examination includes drawing blood, and the test checks for CRF usage and focus.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The children here do their best on the test so that they can go to a good place after leaving the orphanage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The children here do their best on the test so that they can go to a good place after leaving the orphanage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The children here do their best on the test so that they can go to a good place after leaving the orphanage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, there are some children, like us, who don't.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, there are some children, like us, who don't.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, there are some children, like us, who don't.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eve? So how many did you stack this time?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eve? So how many did you stack this time?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eve? So how many did you stack this time?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fifteen...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fifteen...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fifteen...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, same here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, same here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, same here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh! What does stacking blocks have to do with Counter abilities, anyway?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh! What does stacking blocks have to do with Counter abilities, anyway?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh! What does stacking blocks have to do with Counter abilities, anyway?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course it matters... They said they were also evaluating our concentration and dexterity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course it matters... They said they were also evaluating our concentration and dexterity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course it matters... They said they were also evaluating our concentration and dexterity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Are you stupid? You really believe that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Are you stupid? You really believe that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Are you stupid? You really believe that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those adults just like to rank things. This is just an evaluation for the purpose of evaluating.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those adults just like to rank things. This is just an evaluation for the purpose of evaluating.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those adults just like to rank things. This is just an evaluation for the purpose of evaluating.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All that Counters need to be is cool and super strong! Like the Masked Counter!
root.m_Talk_DEU: All that Counters need to be is cool and super strong! Like the Masked Counter!
root.m_Talk_FRA: All that Counters need to be is cool and super strong! Like the Masked Counter!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just like this...! Haah! Hya!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just like this...! Haah! Hya!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just like this...! Haah! Hya!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Kyaaa!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Kyaaa!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Kyaaa!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oops! I'm sorry! Are you okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oops! I'm sorry! Are you okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oops! I'm sorry! Are you okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Filthy child! Don't touch me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Filthy child! Don't touch me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Filthy child! Don't touch me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're nothing but monsters abandoned by your parents...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're nothing but monsters abandoned by your parents...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're nothing but monsters abandoned by your parents...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeesh... She didn't have to be that rude...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeesh... She didn't have to be that rude...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeesh... She didn't have to be that rude...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ann...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ann...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ann...

root.m_Talk_ENG: K-kwaaar?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: K-kwaaar?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: K-kwaaar?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eve?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eve?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eve?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm the Tickle-tickle monster! I-I'm here to punish children who don't laugh!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm the Tickle-tickle monster! I-I'm here to punish children who don't laugh!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm the Tickle-tickle monster! I-I'm here to punish children who don't laugh!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kwarrr!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kwarrr!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kwarrr!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Pfft!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Pfft!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Pfft!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahahahaha! What was that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahahahaha! What was that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahahahaha! What was that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! You've finally shown your face! Tickle-tickle monster!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! You've finally shown your face! Tickle-tickle monster!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! You've finally shown your face! Tickle-tickle monster!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, the Masked Counter will take you on!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, the Masked Counter will take you on!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, the Masked Counter will take you on!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've never thought about what would happen after I left Rosenthal.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've never thought about what would happen after I left Rosenthal.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've never thought about what would happen after I left Rosenthal.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike the other children, I never wanted to go somewhere else.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike the other children, I never wanted to go somewhere else.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike the other children, I never wanted to go somewhere else.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because I was happy just being here with the friends I've made.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because I was happy just being here with the friends I've made.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because I was happy just being here with the friends I've made.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just being able to be together and laugh was all that I wanted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just being able to be together and laugh was all that I wanted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just being able to be together and laugh was all that I wanted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, everyone. Today, I have an exciting announcement.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, everyone. Today, I have an exciting announcement.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, everyone. Today, I have an exciting announcement.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Benjamin was recognized for her aptitude evaluation and was offered a job at a pharmaceutical company.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Benjamin was recognized for her aptitude evaluation and was offered a job at a pharmaceutical company.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Benjamin was recognized for her aptitude evaluation and was offered a job at a pharmaceutical company.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's sad to see her go, but today will be Benjamin's last day at the orphanage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's sad to see her go, but today will be Benjamin's last day at the orphanage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's sad to see her go, but today will be Benjamin's last day at the orphanage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, give Benjamin a big round of applause!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, give Benjamin a big round of applause!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, give Benjamin a big round of applause!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Congrats, Benjamin!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Congrats, Benjamin!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Congrats, Benjamin!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're not going to forget about us just because you got a cushy job now, are you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're not going to forget about us just because you got a cushy job now, are you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're not going to forget about us just because you got a cushy job now, are you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, everyone. I'll send you some gifts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, everyone. I'll send you some gifts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, everyone. I'll send you some gifts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now then, let's eat before all the food gets cold!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now then, let's eat before all the food gets cold!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now then, let's eat before all the food gets cold!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Guys, wait! Before we eat, Eve has something to say to Benjamin!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Guys, wait! Before we eat, Eve has something to say to Benjamin!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Guys, wait! Before we eat, Eve has something to say to Benjamin!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-when did I say that...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-when did I say that...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-when did I say that...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: C'mon, you idiot! Then are you really just going to stand there and not say goodbye to her?
root.m_Talk_DEU: C'mon, you idiot! Then are you really just going to stand there and not say goodbye to her?
root.m_Talk_FRA: C'mon, you idiot! Then are you really just going to stand there and not say goodbye to her?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, Eve? So what did you want to tell me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, Eve? So what did you want to tell me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, Eve? So what did you want to tell me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sniffle...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sniffle...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sniffle...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hngh... Do you really have to go?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hngh... Do you really have to go?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hngh... Do you really have to go?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can't we just live here like we always have? Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can't we just live here like we always have? Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can't we just live here like we always have? Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think I'm going to be sad without you here. So... *Sniffle.*
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think I'm going to be sad without you here. So... *Sniffle.*
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think I'm going to be sad without you here. So... *Sniffle.*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. It's not like we're never going to see each other again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. It's not like we're never going to see each other again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. It's not like we're never going to see each other again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you'll be all right without me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you'll be all right without me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you'll be all right without me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And Eve, you should also develop your aptitude to get a better job than me, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And Eve, you should also develop your aptitude to get a better job than me, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And Eve, you should also develop your aptitude to get a better job than me, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, but still...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, but still...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, but still...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, well. Although I'm not supposed to give crying children presents...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, well. Although I'm not supposed to give crying children presents...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, well. Although I'm not supposed to give crying children presents...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make an exception and give you something special! This is my stuffed animal that I sleep with.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll make an exception and give you something special! This is my stuffed animal that I sleep with.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll make an exception and give you something special! This is my stuffed animal that I sleep with.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A rabbit doll...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A rabbit doll...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A rabbit doll...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, yup. It's a little tattered, but I'll give it to you, Eve. Instead, you have to take good care of it, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, yup. It's a little tattered, but I'll give it to you, Eve. Instead, you have to take good care of it, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, yup. It's a little tattered, but I'll give it to you, Eve. Instead, you have to take good care of it, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right. Now no more crying!
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right. Now no more crying!
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right. Now no more crying!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...No more crying!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...No more crying!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...No more crying!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, Benjamin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, Benjamin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, Benjamin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll... take real good care of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll... take real good care of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll... take real good care of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, everyone! Before we start the feast, let's say a prayer to thank Mother for Benjamin!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, everyone! Before we start the feast, let's say a prayer to thank Mother for Benjamin!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, everyone! Before we start the feast, let's say a prayer to thank Mother for Benjamin!

root.m_Talk_ENG: All this food is communion made from our Mother's flesh and blood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All this food is communion made from our Mother's flesh and blood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All this food is communion made from our Mother's flesh and blood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So everyone should all eat while praying for Benjamin's bright future ahead of her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So everyone should all eat while praying for Benjamin's bright future ahead of her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So everyone should all eat while praying for Benjamin's bright future ahead of her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But we didn't know back then.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But we didn't know back then.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But we didn't know back then.

root.m_Talk_ENG: About what will happen to us, or the orphanage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: About what will happen to us, or the orphanage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: About what will happen to us, or the orphanage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Prepare the feast. A new dawn is coming.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Prepare the feast. A new dawn is coming.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Prepare the feast. A new dawn is coming.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The feast will complete the imperfect knowledge and perfect the imperfect beings.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The feast will complete the imperfect knowledge and perfect the imperfect beings.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The feast will complete the imperfect knowledge and perfect the imperfect beings.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When shall the banquet begin?
root.m_Talk_DEU: When shall the banquet begin?
root.m_Talk_FRA: When shall the banquet begin?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The long thirst and hunger are finally coming to an end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The long thirst and hunger are finally coming to an end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The long thirst and hunger are finally coming to an end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The host of the feast has arrived. Mother has arrived.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The host of the feast has arrived. Mother has arrived.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The host of the feast has arrived. Mother has arrived.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Eve!
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Eve!
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Eve!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Ann?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Ann?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Ann?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wake up, sleepyhead! How much longer are you gonna stay in bed?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wake up, sleepyhead! How much longer are you gonna stay in bed?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wake up, sleepyhead! How much longer are you gonna stay in bed?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... huh? What's that rag doll you got there?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... huh? What's that rag doll you got there?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... huh? What's that rag doll you got there?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Rag?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Rag?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Rag?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't call it that...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't call it that...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't call it that...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How can you say something so mean?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: How can you say something so mean?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: How can you say something so mean?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you getting angry at me for?! I'm just saying what was on my mind...
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you getting angry at me for?! I'm just saying what was on my mind...
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you getting angry at me for?! I'm just saying what was on my mind...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you talking about...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you talking about...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you talking about...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You saw it with me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You saw it with me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You saw it with me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This doll... This doll was! At yesterday's feast...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: This doll... This doll was! At yesterday's feast...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: This doll... This doll was! At yesterday's feast...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: At the feast.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At the feast.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At the feast.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who gave me... this doll?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who gave me... this doll?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who gave me... this doll?
